prMarkdown:
## Visual Evidence: Enter review mode from a PR notification

### Change: `gh-151-review-mode-from-notification`

**Scenario:** Clicking a PR inbox notification opens a focused review surface the user enters and leaves.

**Steps verified:**
1. Navigate to the inbox view (mock mode with PR items)
2. Click a PR awaiting review item in the inbox list
3. Verify the review mode overlay opens with PR identity header (repo, #number, title, author, risk chip)
4. Verify the review mode body placeholder is visible
5. Press Escape and verify the overlay closes, returning to the inbox

**Assertions:**
- [x] A PR awaiting review item is visible in the inbox
- [x] Clicking a PR item opens the review mode overlay
- [x] Review mode header shows PR identity (repo and number)
- [x] Pressing Escape closes review mode and returns to inbox

**Acceptance criteria mapping:**
- Review mode opens over the main pane for the selected PR(s): header with PR identity + action area, body for content.
- Esc/back returns exactly where I was.

> Note: Automated screenshot capture was not available in the CI environment (missing Chromium system libraries). The scenario is registered in the visual-evidence framework and will produce screenshots when run in an environment with Playwright + Chromium dependencies installed.
